controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid created in accordance with Manuscripts and Archives Processing Manual

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 7, 2020 at 11:19

did.abstract: Correspondence, manuscript drafts, photographs and research materials for an article, "The last three days of Mussolini," written by Valerian Lada-Mocarski (1898-1971) and published in the Atlantic Monthly, December 1945. The papers include copies of the article.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Mussolini Collection of V. Lada-Mocarski. Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This is a collection of research notes, manuscript drafts, correspondence, photographs and printed material about the days just prior to and after the execution of Mussolini in April of 1945, assembled by V. Lada-Mocarski for a magazine article, "The Last Three Days of Mussolini," Atlantic Monthly , December 1945. In 1945 Mr. Lada-Mocarski was in the O.S.S. in Switzerland and was granted permission to enter Italy right after the execution. He was able to obtain many eyewitness accounts.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has been transferred to Yale University for unpublished materials authored or otherwise produced by the creator(s) of this collection. Copyright status for other collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: "The Last Three Days of Mussolini" from the Atlantic Monthly , 3 copies
"The Last Three Days of Mussolini" from the Atlantic Monthly , 2 xerox copies
Detailed account on events... Il Capitano di Fregata
Composites of last days and execution
"Last Days of Mussolini and His Ministers"
"Last Days of Mussolini and His Ministers"
P-1 Mocarski, partisans and reprisal scenes
P-3 Valla and partisans near Como where he worked out of Lugano, Switzerland
P-5 Where Mussolini and Petacci were shot
Passports, foreign exchange, luggage stickers, etc.
"What Happened to Mussolini's Millions" by Edmund Palmieri and John Kobler
Topographical map of the Como District, Italy
